description.unified: Deals ??? M.DMG that ignores enemy DEF, and heals 25% of DMG as HP.
Moves behind the furthest enemy and deals ??? M.DMG. Hit enemies take [20%->30%] increased M.DMG for [5 sec->10 sec].
Deals ??? M.DMG to all enemies in range. Gains CC immunity while using this skill.
When an enemy is killed by this hero, ATK is increased by ??? for [15 sec->12 sec], and all skill cooldown is reduced by 30%.

IV.unified: Per each kill, recovers [1000->1 orb] of mana.

dark.unified: Mana consumption is increased by [2000->1], and upon using the skill, [Absorbing Blow] is activated. Cannot use when there are no enemies in range.
DMG taken is reduced by 50% while skill is in use.

dark.unified: While stack number is higher than 5, [(added) Mana is always at 100% and] cooldowns are decreased by an additional 1 sec per each sec.

description.unified: [Absorbing Blow] Increases DMG by {0}% and upon killing an enemy, ATK is increased by [(added) 20%] for [(added) 10 sec]. ATK increase effect can be stacked up to max [(added) 3 times].
[Devil's Prom] Mana cost is reduced by 1, and Crit DMG is increased by {0}%.

dark.unified: All of Epis's attacks decrease the M.DEF of hit enemies by 20% for 10 sec. ATK rises by [4%->2%] per each enemy hit. Maximum stack number is [5->10].

description.unified: Upon attacking, there is a 25% chance of dealing {0}% of ATK as extra M.DMG, and ATK being increased by {1}% ATK boost can be stacked up to [5->10] times max.

Summons the Soul of The Seductress, Guillotine, and increases own ATK by 40% for 8 sec. For the duration of Skill, Normal and Skill attacks have 20% chance to deal ??? M.DMG that ignores DEF to a target. If [Absorbing Blow] hits a target, this effect will activate with a 100% chance.
